mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO HR_ADDRESS_MATTERS_APPLY ( ADDRESS_NO, PERSON_ID, ADDRESS_TYPE, EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, ADDRESS_CONTENT, ACTIVITY, NATIONALITY, APPLY_TYPE, UPDATE_ADDRESS_NO, ESS_TYPE_CODE, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATE_BY, UPDATED_IP ) VALUES ( #{addressNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addressType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TO_DATE(#{effectiveStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
NULL,
#{addressContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{nationality, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyType, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{updateAddressNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{essTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT ADDRESS_NO, PERSON_ID, ADDRESS_TYPE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(ADDRESS_TYPE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS ADDRESS_TYPE_NAME, TO_CHAR(EFFECTIVE_START_DATE,'YYYY/MM/DD') AS EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, ADDRESS_CONTENT, ACTIVITY, NATIONALITY, APPLY_TYPE, UPDATE_ADDRESS_NO, ESS_TYPE_CODE, CALLBACK, EARROR FROM HR_ADDRESS_MATTERS_APPLY WHERE ADDRESS_NO = #{addressNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
